props.desc: Container aggregating ammo, weapon, atmosphere, winds, and shooting geometry (look/cant/azimuth) to compute barrel elevation/azimuth.
Translates Shot into engine-ready internal scalars (feet/sec/grains) with precomputed interpolation spline for drag curves.
Bitmask for ballistic points of interest (ZERO, MACH, APEX, MRT).
Complete trajectory results including integration points and metadata.
CIPM-2007 atmospheric density model with lapse-rate based altitude correction.
Combines BC, drag tables, and physical properties; supports multi-BC form factor interpolation into a custom spline.
4th-order Runge-Kutta integrator with adaptive Dormand-Prince step control and iterative zero finder.
UI state machine for SSD1306/U8g2 display; handles live shooting HUD, digital level with inversion logic, and sensor dashboards.
ShotProps.from_shot(shot) performs unit conversion and spline precalculation.
RK4 solver calls DragModel::dragByMach() in the inner acceleration loop.
Calculator class encapsulates EngineRK4 for solving and correction queries.
Display::setCorrection takes ballistic::CorrectionResult which is the output of Calculator.
Python visualizer modules consume HitResult for matplotlib plotting and pandas export.
AtmoPrecomp uses polynomial barometric formula to eliminate pow() calls during trajectory integration.
Uses float Vector3f for inner-loop FPU acceleration on ESP32 while keeping position in double.
